title: UsageReport
description: Usage and metering data reported by a provider for a provisioned resource, used for billing and reconciliation

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this usage report

resource_id.description: The provisioned resource this usage report covers

offering_id.description: The service offering this usage relates to

tier_id.description: The tier the resource is on during this reporting period

period_start.description: Start of the reporting period (ISO 8601, inclusive)

period_end.description: End of the reporting period (ISO 8601, exclusive)

dimensions.description: Metered usage dimensions with quantities and costs

total_cost.description: Total cost for the reporting period across all dimensions

overage_cost.description: Cost for usage exceeding the tier's included limits

countersignature.description: Agent's Ed25519 countersignature acknowledging this usage report, null if not yet countersigned

countersignature_deadline.description: Deadline by which the agent must countersign, null if countersignature not required

dispute_window_ends_at.description: Timestamp after which this usage report can no longer be disputed

provider_signature.description: Ed25519 signature by the provider over the canonical JSON of this report (excluding this field)

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this report was generated (ISO 8601)

metadata.description: Provider-specific metadata about the usage period

budget_status.description: Current budget consumption status relative to guardrails (v1.1)

burn_rate.description: Current burn rate for TTL-based environments (v1.1)

trace_id.description: OpenTelemetry trace ID linking this report to provisioning traces (v1.1)

UsageDimension.description: A single metered usage dimension with quantity and optional cost

quantity.description: Quantity consumed as a string to preserve precision

included_quantity.description: Quantity included in the tier's base price

unit_price.description: Price per unit of overage usage

cost.description: Total cost for this dimension's overage

amount.description: Cost amount as string to avoid floating point precision issues

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or stablecoin identifier

BudgetStatus.description: Budget consumption status relative to FinOps guardrails (v1.1)

alert_triggered.description: Whether the alert threshold has been triggered

BurnRate.description: Burn rate tracking for TTL-based environments (v1.1)

ttl_remaining_seconds.description: Seconds until this environment's TTL expires, null if persistent

estimated_total_cost.description: Estimated total cost until TTL expiration
